3.修復了某些情況下無法觸發登仙任務劇情的問題
tw.description:
《鬼谷八荒》是一款開放世界的沙盒修仙遊戲。結合了修仙體系與山海經文化背景，體驗從凡人一步步修行成長為強者的過程，與山海經中各種妖、獸戰鬥。你是否能堅守本心，與困難做鬥爭；慎做抉擇，把握自己的命運。
【遁入修仙世界，開啟逆天人生】  
鬼谷八荒，除了財侶法地，還有詭祕莫測的妖獸，危機重重的秘境，難以逾越的天塹，彩光四射的祕寶，等著被人發現。  
你將作為一個煉氣期小修士從愚村出發，修煉，變強，危機中九死一生。每一次突破，你都能逆天改命，助你在旅途上披荊斬棘，跨越五大州，睥睨天下，再闖上天元山，向天道一問。  

【AI互動生態，給NPC完整的一生】  
我們構建了完整的NPC互動生態，他們「生活」在這裡，有自己的朋友親族關係網，自己的人生軌跡，不受玩家的進度限制，除非，你決定出手干涉。  
你可兼濟天下，攜手紅顏；你可獨善其身，快意恩仇；你亦可逆天而行，與全世界為敵。  
和NPC們切磋武藝，傳授道心，拜師學藝，收徒授業。和NPC在拍賣場喊價廝殺，結束後拔刀相向或順手牽羊。你將成為修仙界群像中的一部分，是大放異彩，還是默默修行，皆看你如何選擇。  

【體驗小說橋段，感受奇遇驚喜】  
英雄救美？愛人為你爭風吃醋？五十年之約？捲入神秘組織的明爭暗鬥？遺蹟遇寶？又慘遭奪寶？  
這些都有可能發生在你身上。  
除NPC交互之外，這裡還有豐富的隨機事件以及支線任務，在你的旅途上給予驚喜。它們或許會讓你煩惱，餵你刀子，也可能讓你化險為夷，甚至破而後立。在一步又一步的選擇過程中，你將譜寫只屬於你的，獨一無二的故事。  

【打造最強宗門，攻城略地一統八荒】  
我們構建了宗門的經營玩法，身為弟子、長老以及宗主，將會有不同的體驗。你可以加入大宗門，從最底層的弟子做起，一步步爬上權力的階梯。也可以空降落魄的小宗門，力挽狂瀾，帶領宗門重振雄風。  
弟子可以完成宗門任務，在宗門大比中出戰，或隨同門出征作戰，為宗門積累資源，為宗門贏取榮譽，為宗門擴張土地。  
長老可以管轄門下弟子，傳道授業，分配任務職能，加速宗門成長，在宗門大戰中指導弟子大殺四方。  
宗主則需要統籌全宗的秩序，制定侵略和防守計劃，攻防靈礦等資源點，甚至佔領他人宗門，奪取專屬逆天改命和祕籍。  
一統八荒，只要你有宏圖壯志和鐵腕手段，不再只是幻想。  

【構築獨特流派，挑戰妖獸神仙】  
闖蕩這世界，需要有傍身之技。  
心法築根基，武技/靈技探深淺，身法創機會，絕技造優勢，神通定乾坤。不同祕籍有不同的特性。  
修仙者還有十二大靈根，對應不同的流派，你可以選擇專精一路，或全面發展。十二種靈根都有對應的功法祕籍，排列組合可組成豐富的流派，孰強孰弱，皆由你評斷。  
城鎮琅琊閣、宗門功法閣、秘境、各種任務，甚至路邊一個土坑裡，都可能發現珍奇祕籍，充滿驚喜。  
這個世界上還有上百種珍奇妖獸，無數修仙者、鬼怪、仙人供你檢驗自己的實力。挑戰升仙擂台，衝擊各大洲參玄榜，以此證明自己的實力。你能否踏破冥山的障礙一路向前？構築的流派能否經歷大浪淘沙的檢驗？  

【法寶器靈煉丹畫符，三大神器伴前路】  
練好自身本領，也別忘了外力加持。  
開局三大神器，每一個都會給你帶來一種獨一無二的系統。雙魚佩可以復活自己和選中之人，昊天眼可以偷學妖獸技能，洞察更多訊息，而煉妖壺則可以讓你捕獲BOSS成為你的小跟班，替你戰鬥或派遣尋求寶物。  
除了開局神器之外，你也能煉製你自己的法寶，並收服器靈與你一起戰鬥，此外器靈還會在探索中給予你陪伴，觸發專屬的奇遇等等。  
在這裡，你還可以學習煉丹畫符、堪輿風水，製作幫助你探索世界、整蠱仇人、戰鬥殺敵的種種道具。至於如何發揮它們真正的作用，皆看各位道友如何抉擇。

tw.description:
「Cytus II」是雷亞遊戲繼「Cytus」、「Deemo」及「VOEZ」三款全球音樂遊戲排行榜冠軍作品後，由原班人馬傾注全力打造的音樂節奏遊戲續作。


未來，人類重新定義了網路的發展和連線方式，能夠輕易地在現實世界同步存取網路世界，改變了千年以來生活的樣貌。

在巨型精神網路空間cyTus裡，一位來歷不明的傳奇DJ Æsir，其音樂有著讓人為之瘋狂的魅力，每個音符和節拍都能夠深深重擊聽者的靈魂深處。

某日，從未露面的Æsir突然宣布要舉辦第一場大型虛擬音樂祭——Æsir-FEST，邀請了當紅偶像歌手以及人氣DJ作為開場嘉賓。

宣傳公開之際即造成前所未見的討論熱潮，所有人無不想一睹Æsir的真實面貌。

而在音樂祭入場的前一小時，數以千萬計的連線瀏覽次數打破歷史紀錄，整個城市瞬間沸騰了起來，等待Æsir如同天神般的降臨……

遊戲特色：

-獨特動態判定線音樂遊戲玩法
跟隨判定線打擊拍點以獲得高分，透過五種不同特性的拍點及隨節奏動態變化的判定線，讓遊戲過程更貼合音樂，輕鬆融入並沉浸在樂曲之中。

-50首+IAP(額外付費內容)，超越250首最高質量樂曲
本次收錄樂曲涵蓋世界各地如日韓、歐美、台灣等創作者的作品，透過數位角色引領玩家遊玩如電音、搖滾、古典等不同風格之樂曲，是不辜負千萬人期待的自信力作。

-多達800種不同譜面關卡 
設計超過800種由易到難的音樂譜面，豐富的遊戲內容滿足不同等級的玩家，透過指尖的打擊體驗最刺激的挑戰和樂趣。

-與遊戲中的角色們一同進入虛擬的網路世界探險
獨特的故事系統 "iM" 將帶領玩家與遊戲中的角色逐步拼湊出 「Cytus II」背後的劇情脈絡與世界觀，在極富動態的視覺體驗中揭開故事的真實面貌。

tw.description:
【遊戲簡介】
《召喚騎士團》是由橄欖熊貓工作室製作的一款RPG卡牌像素風遊戲。 分為《騎士之歌》和《群星之章》兩部分玩法和內容，遊戲透過免費下載內購解鎖的方式取得全部的遊玩內容。

【內購解鎖】
全內容解鎖：8.99USD
騎士之歌劇情模式：4.99USD
群星之章自由模式：4.99USD
兩個模式都支持先體驗再付費解鎖，《騎士之歌》可以免費體驗至第二章節結束，《群星之章》免費體驗遊戲內時間一年。
PS：該金額會根據當地匯率進行換算

《騎士之歌》：
劇情改編自諾貝爾文學獎得主亨里克·顯克微支《十字軍騎士》，主要玩法為卡牌的RPG角色扮演，在卡牌戰鬥的同時加入了夥伴技能連攜系統，將根據玩家打出 的牌釋放不同的專屬技能，從而建構不同的流派。 在遊戲中也會認識並招募到眾多同伴，踏上一段波瀾壯闊的旅程。

《群星之章》：
遊戲的主舞台在一個名為安塔納的魔幻大陸上，在這裡擁有風俗迥異的六個國家，玩家將扮演其中一個王國的小領主。
在魔界即將入侵這片大陸的前夕，玩家需要前往各地尋找自己騎士團的伙伴，建立屬於自己的騎士團，展開冒險，增強自己的實力，守護人類戰線。

【設備支援】
·iOS 10.0及更高版本
·運行記憶體3G以及以上機型
·iphone7 以上機型
·ipad Air3以上機型

【聯絡我們】
遊戲過程中需要協助，或遇到問題，可以通過郵件聯絡反饋。
官方郵箱：knight@longyougame.com

tw.description:
Airport ground maneuvering simulation of more than 40 different airports including 
London Heathrow LHR, Philadelphia PHL, Miami Intl. MIA, Singapore, New York JFK, Las Vegas LAS, São Paulo GRU, Montreal YUL, Boston BOS,  and many more. 

Different versions of airports included:
- Play the simplified version, where the airport is scaled down to an easy playable experience.
- Play the real thing. Here the whole airport is in real size displayed, where all your skills are required.

Features
- Give pushback, taxi, holding and take-off clearances. 
- Handle emergencies and try to release all flights on time in order to release the next level.

From an easy single-runway operation at the beginning to demanding hub airports with multiple active runways where all your skills are required.

tw.description:
「海拔指南针」—— 纯净无广告的指南针与水印相机工具。

无广告、无订阅、无隐私收集，即开即用。
适合登山、徒步、露营、旅行打卡和户外摄影，
拍照时可记录海拔、经纬度、气压、时间等环境信息（支持 HDR）。

App 支持显示当前位置的海拔、气压、经纬度等环境信息，此外还：
1. 支持切换 GPS 信息或手机高度计作为海拔数据信源（需要 iPhone 12 或更新机型且安装 iOS 15 或更新系统）。
2. 支持实景相机（仅 iPhone），拍摄时添加环境信息和日期水印到照片，照片支持 HDR（需要 iPhone 12 或更新机型且安装 iOS 17 或更新系统）。
3. 支持水平仪、速度计及当前位置日出日落时间计算，点击指南针面板展示或隐藏。
4. 支持深色及浅色模式、全局字体替换等 UI 自定义功能。
5. 支持切换海拔、气压及位置数据的显示模式，点击 App 底部的文本即可弹出配置。
6. 支持桌面小组件（iOS 14）、锁屏小组件（iOS 16），支持 iOS 17 的 Standby 模式。
7. 无任何烦人的广告、无乱扣费的订阅内购、无任何隐私收集。
8. 超小的体积、超快的速度、超少资源占用、下载安装使用无负担。

权限申请说明：
1.网络权限
App 不需要网络也能使用绝大部分功能。
网络权限的申请用于：获取逆地理编码（坐标转地名）以及最后一个面板的地图加载。
2.相册权限
App 只需要相册的写入权限，iOS 14 及以上的用户无需选择照片供 App 访问。
3.位置权限
精确位置权限用于获得 GPS 的海拔高度。
4.运动与健身权限
iOS 17.4 之后需要该权限才能读取设备的气压计信息。

tw.description:
以嶄新的畫質與音質復活的《FINAL FANTASY IV》像素複刻版。

著名RPG遊戲《FF》系列第四作現已通過精美鮮明的2D畫面回歸。
原版的氣氛與樂趣有了更大的提升，玩家可以更輕鬆地享受這一不朽篇章。

強大的軍事國家巴隆有一支名為赤翼隊的精銳飛空艇部隊，而帶領這支隊伍的隊長塞西爾對不斷侵略他國的任務感到十分苦惱，最終堅定了與摯友和戀人一同逃離這個國家的心意，然而……
圍繞著水晶，以地面、地底、幻界、乃至月球為舞臺而展開的波瀾壯闊的故事就此展開。

以暗黑騎士塞西爾為首，還有龍騎士凱因，白魔法師羅莎、召喚士莉蒂亞等不同職業、能力各異的同伴登場。還有戲劇性的劇情以及多彩的戰鬥都等著你的到來。
從本作開始，戰鬥系統變為了“即時戰鬥”，提高了緊張感與戰略性的“ATB”也成為了《FINAL FANTASY》系列的代名詞。
而本作正是為之後的進化打下了堅實的基礎的人氣作。

---------------------------------------------

■以嶄新的畫質與音質完美復活！
・創造出代表《FF》的點陣角色的澀谷員子也加入進重制隊伍之中，所有的畫面都以鮮活的2D得以重現。
・為《FF》的世界注入生命的諸多名曲，也都在作曲者植松伸夫先生的完全監修之下獲得改編。

■更加輕鬆地體驗遊戲！
・複刻版搭載了經過全面改良的UI系統、自動戰鬥與自動保存功能，方便玩家能更加愉悅地體驗遊戲。
・支援控制器操作。將控制器連接上機器，就能以控制器專用UI遊玩遊戲。
・還追加了怪物圖鑒、插畫鑒賞與音樂鑒賞等能夠更進一步享受遊戲世界的要素。
・BGM音源可以在本作的“改編”設定和原作的“原版”設定中進行切換。
・追加了“遇敵開關”和“獲得經驗值0~4倍”等功能，大幅增加了遊戲的趣味性。

※本應用程式為完全買斷制。下載之後可一直遊玩至遊戲結局。
※本作為以1991年發售的原版《FINAL FANTASY IV》為基礎開發的複刻版。不包含一部分其他重製版中變更、追加的要素。

【對應OS】
iOS13.0及以上

【推薦機種】
iPhone7 Plus／iPad(第7代)／iPad Air(第3代)／iPad mini(第5代) 及以上

tw.description:
------------------------------------------------------
- As this application is very large, it will take some time to download.
- This application takes up around 2GB of memory. Over 4GB of free space is required to download it, so make sure that ample spare memory is available before attempting to do so. 
------------------------------------------------------

Recommended hardware:
iPhone 5s or later, 3rd generation iPad or later, iPad mini 2 or later, iPod touch 6

Supported OS:
iOS 8.0 or later
*Please be aware that users may experience problems, such as exceptionally slow running speeds, if running this application on devices other than those outlined in the recommended hardware section.  Such devices are not suited to playing this game and there is a chance of unforeseen errors occurring if running it on them.


Outline

The smash hit RPG: Final Fantasy VII, which has sold over 11,000,000 units* worldwide, finally arrives on iOS!
*Total includes both packaged sales and downloads.

The first Final Fantasy to feature 3D backgrounds and CG movie scenes, this dramatic tale continues to be loved by numerous fans around the world. Battle stages also appear in full 3D for the first time, bringing an even greater sense of awe and spectacle to combat!

Customize your characters in any way you like using the fantastic “material” system that allows endless combinations of spells and abilities.

This product is a port based on Final Fantasy VII for PC (No changes or additions have been made to the story). 


Story

With its unshakeable monopoly over Mako energy production, the evil Shinra Electric Power Company holds tight to the reigns of world power.
One day, a Mako reactor serving the sprawling metropolis of Midgar is attacked and destroyed in a bombing raid by a revolutionary group calling themselves Avalanche. 
Cloud Strife, a former member of Shinra’s elite “Soldier” unit takes part in the raid as a mercenary hired by Avalanche and sets events in motion that will draw him and his friends into an epic struggle for the fate of the planet itself…


Special features for the iOS edition 

- Play using a simple and comfortable virtual controller designed not to obscure the action, choosing between virtual analogue or fixed 4-way digital control pad options. The opacity of on-screen controls can also be adjusted from the Config Menu.

- Two new features to make play easier and more convenient!
The iOS edition also includes an option to turn enemy encounters off on the world and area maps (will not skip event battles) and a Max Stats command to become all-powerful in the blink of an eye.


Major game controls

Movement: Virtual joypad (Select between analogue and digital modes)
Menu navigation: Fixed digital buttons
Confirm: A button
Cancel: B button
Open menu: Y button

以嶄新的畫質與音質復活的《FINAL FANTASY V》像素複刻版。

著名RPG遊戲《FF》系列第五作現已通過精美鮮明的2D畫面回歸。
原版的氣氛與樂趣有了更大的提升，玩家可以更輕鬆地享受這一不朽篇章。

“風的律動發生了變化?”調和世界的四塊水晶即將遭遇變故。泰空國國王比所有人都更早察知這一變故，追查真相前往風之水晶之後就杳無音信……
而乘著陸行鳥的旅行者巴茲則像是被命運指引著一般與同伴們相遇了。

為人熟知的“轉職系統”得到了更進一步的進化，職業也變得更加豐富多彩，可以自由結合各式各樣能力的“能力系統”也在本作登場。

tw.description:
全球出貨＆下載超過100萬套的
《Trials of Mana》在智慧型手機上登場！

不論過去有沒有遊玩過《聖劍傳說》系列作品，都能夠盡情享受本作品帶來的樂趣。

◆故事
從前，世界仍處在被黑暗所壟罩的時代。瑪那女神以「瑪那之劍」打倒了將世界導向毀滅的8個災厄化身--「神獸」，並將其封印在8個要石之中。
就這樣，黑暗褪去，世界就此誕生了。

瑪那女神化身為大樹陷入了沉睡，並經過了漫長的歲月……
然而卻出現了一群人，企圖從8個要石之中，再度將神獸解放出來，以獲取超越神的力量，並藉此掌握世界。於是，世界上紛爭四起……和平的時代宣告終結……

與此同時，瑪那迅速地從這世上消失，瑪那之樹也開始枯萎衰弱……

◆主角
故事開始時可以從6名角色當中選擇3人。本作採用了獨特的「三線故事」設計。根據選擇的主角與夥伴不同，將會帶來不同的冒險旅程。

◆畫質
以全3D技術呈現出美麗的瑪那世界！ 過去令人懷念的場景與角色們將以漂亮的畫質重現。

◆戰鬥系統
戰鬥系統加入了跳躍、連段攻擊、閃避敵人攻擊等多樣化動作重新打造。本作依然保有《聖劍傳說》系列傳統的「環狀指令」，還另外新增了「快捷鍵指令」。

◆成長系統
「光」或「闇」--透過「轉職」讓角色的類型與外觀產生變化！ 本作新增了4階職業，還以超過300種的「技能」重新調整成長系統，讓養成變得更加自由。

◆難度設定
分為「非常簡單、簡單、普通、困難」4個階段。如果您不擅長動作遊戲，希望以享受劇情為主的話，推薦您選擇即使全滅也能原地復活的「非常簡單」。

◆全新的編曲
本作收錄了多達60首由作曲家菊田裕樹監修的全新編曲！ 也可將音樂切換至原版的音源遊玩。

◆角色語音
由豪華配音陣容帶來的語音體驗！ 隨著隊伍組合不同，冒險中的支線對話也會改變……

◆通關後要素
觀賞完結局後，將會觸發對應各主角的嶄新篇章。在通過嶄新篇章後，便可以「繼承過關資料開始新遊戲」，還能選擇挑戰「非常困難」與極度難以通關的「沒有未來」難度。

◆其他嶄新要素
新增了可以遊玩各主角故事開端的「序章體驗」，以及《聖劍傳說》系列中大家熟悉的「仙人掌小弟」探索，還大幅更新了「種子」的種類。另外，本遊戲也支援自動儲存功能。

◆智慧型手機版本的特徵
‧翻修為便於觸控使用的選單，能夠以虛擬面板操控角色。
‧新增自動鎖定目標、自動調整鏡頭、自動戰鬥等功能。
‧可以在選項中自行選擇喜歡的畫質。
‧支援雲端儲存。
‧能夠獲得兩件初始裝備，裝備時直到Lv17都會發揮特殊效果，它們分別是增加戰鬥所獲經驗值的「拉比兔飾品」，以及增加戰鬥所獲盧克的「絲尾拉比兔飾品」。

【應用程式大小】
‧本應用程式的大小約為6.7GB。購買前請先確認裝置可用的儲存空間。
‧啟動應用程式後，於通過最初的BOSS戰後將需要下載大量資料。也可以一開始就用標題畫面的「下載」全部下載。
‧強烈建議使用Wi-Fi下載。

【遊玩人數】
1人

--------------------------------------------------
Due to the size of the application, the download may take a considerable amount of time to complete. The app uses 3.9GB of space. When downloading the game for the first time, you must have more than 4GB of space available on your device. Version updates for the app will use more than 4GB of space. Please ensure that there is plenty of space available on your device before downloading.
--------------------------------------------------

■Description
Selling over 5.5million copies since its release in 2000, FINAL FANTASY IX proudly returns on iOS! 
Now you can relive the adventures of Zidane and his crew in the palm of your hands!

Enjoy this classic FINAL FANTASY experience with no additional fees or purchases.


■Story
Zidane and the Tantalus Theater Troupe have kidnapped Princess Garnet, the heir of Alexandria. 
To their surprise, however, the princess herself yearned to escape the castle. 
Through a series of unusual circumstances, she and her personal guard, Steiner, fall in with Zidane and set out on an incredible journey. 
Meeting unforgettable characters like Vivi and Quina along the way, they learn about themselves, the secrets of the Crystal, and a malevolent force that threatens to destroy their world.


■Gameplay Features

・Abilities
Learn new abilities by equipping items. 
When fully mastered, these abilities can be used even without equipping items, allowing for nearly endless customization options.

・Trance
Fill your Trance gauge as you sustain hits in battle. 
When fully charged, your characters will enter Trance mode, granting them powerful new skills!

・Synthesis
Never let items go to waste. Combine two items or pieces of equipment together and make better, stronger items!

・Minigames
Whether it's Chocobo Hot and Cold, Jump Rope, or Tetra Master, there are plenty of minigames to enjoy when you're not off saving the world. 
You can even earn special item rewards!


■Additional Features
・Achievements
・7 game boosters including high speed and no encounter modes.
・Autosave
・High-definition movies and character models.



ーーーーーーー
Operating System
iOS 15.6 or later



Recommended Devices
iPhone 7, iPhone 11 Pro Max, iPhone 12, iPhone 14, iPhone 15 Pro, iPhone 16 Pro Max, iPhone 16e
iPad Pro (3rd Generation), iPad Pro (4th Generation), iPad Air 5

We cannot guarantee proper performance on devices other than those listed above.
Please confirm your device model before downloading this app.

tw.description:
以嶄新的畫質與音質復活的《FINAL FANTASY VI》像素複刻版。

著名RPG遊戲《FF》系列第六作現已通過精美鮮明的2D畫面回歸。
原版的氣氛與樂趣有了更大的提升，玩家可以更輕鬆地享受這一不朽篇章。

魔大戰……那是一場燒盡萬物的戰爭，當戰爭結束之時，名為“魔法”的力量從世上消失了。
千年之後，人類利用機械的力量使世界復蘇，而這時，一名生來就擁有魔導之力的少女出現了。

通過能夠習得能力、魔法以及召喚的“魔石系統”，能夠使玩家按自己的喜好來培養角色。
主要角色均為主人公。他們懷有著各種目的，而他們的命運又相互交錯編織成了這一群像劇。
作為當時FF系列的巔峰之作，本作至今都享有極高的人氣。

---------------------------------------------

■以嶄新的畫質與音質完美復活！
・創造出代表《FF》的點陣角色的澀谷員子也加入進重制隊伍之中，所有的畫面都以鮮活的2D得以重現。

■更加輕鬆地體驗遊戲！
・複刻版搭載了經過全面改良的UI系統、自動戰鬥與自動保存功能，方便玩家能更加愉悅地體驗遊戲。
・支援控制器操作。將控制器連接上機器，就能以控制器專用UI遊玩遊戲。
・還追加了怪物圖鑒、插畫鑒賞與音樂鑒賞等能夠更進一步享受遊戲世界的要素。
・BGM音源可以在本作的“改編”設定和原作的“原版”設定中進行切換。

tw.description:
《Final Fantasy III》在iPhone上堂堂登場!

世界被黑暗所籠罩，光明正在逐漸消失。
被水晶所選中的4名少年少女即將踏上冒險的旅程。

《Final Fantasy III》是FF系列中第一款銷量突破百萬的作品，有著非常重大的紀念意義。
在本作中首次出現了能夠隨時根據狀況變更當前職業的“轉職系統”，以及能夠召喚出希瓦、巴哈姆特等召喚獸的“召喚魔法”，這些要素在之後的系列作品中也一直繼承了下去，並且已經成為了系列的最大特色之一。

在3D重製版中，所有圖像都以全新的3D面貌登場，再次為《FFIII》創下了新的紀錄。

·4名主角的角色設定與設計煥然一新，並追加了新的劇情。

·3D圖像使得劇情與戰鬥的表現形式更為豐富。

·改良了系統，使得職業特性更為明顯，遊戲平衡也更加方便遊戲。

·能夠隨時中斷遊戲，並且追加中斷存檔及自動封存，強化了存檔功能。

--------------------------------------------

智慧型手機版還進行了以下改進。

·圖像對應高解析度，事件劇情的構成煥然一新。

·配合觸屏操作調整了介面。

·豐富了能夠鑒賞插圖及BGM的鑒賞模式。

·還更新了貫通職業後能獲得的頂級職業證書及莫古網路等深掘遊戲要素。

advisories: 偶而/輕微的卡通或幻想暴力
tw.releaseNotes: 修正了一個問題。
tw.description:
奔向被忘卻的過去、遙遠的未來，以及時間的盡頭……
為了拯救星球的命運，一場宏大的冒險就此拉開帷幕。

■説明
集結了「勇者鬥惡龍」的堀井雄二、「七龍珠」的鳥山明、「FINAL FANTASY」開發人員的夢幻組合所創造之名作RPG。
故事將會在「現代」「中世紀」「未來」「原始」「古代」等各個時代中穿梭並逐漸展開。

重製了操作方式、視覺效果與音效，能為玩家帶來絕佳的遊戲體驗。
也支援Apple TV與遊戲手把！
此外，遊戲中也收錄了重製版的新增地下城「次元扭曲點」「龍之聖域」。
本作將會是『超時空之鑰』的決定版。

■劇情
加爾迪亞王國建國千年慶典上，在“麗內廣場”一角，少年克羅諾巧遇一位名叫瑪爾的少女。

兩人一起逛著慶典，突然看到克羅諾青梅竹馬的好朋友露卡，正在介紹她發明的物質傳送裝置“傳送門”。
然而傳送門突然失控，將出於好奇心而站上實驗台的瑪爾卷走，消失在次元的洞穴中。

克羅諾撿起瑪爾留下的項墜，追在她身後跳進了次元的洞穴，沒想到來到了400年前的世界……

■特徴
・动态时间战斗Ver2
戰鬥中時間會不斷地流逝，角色的集氣條滿了之後玩家便能選擇指令。
敵人的位置也會不斷變化，所以請視當下的狀況選擇行動吧。

・配合技能
戰鬥中可以使用各角色的特殊能力或魔法等「技能」。
此外，還能夠使用由不同角色技能組合而成的「2人技」「3人技」等50種以上的配合技能！

・新增地下城
可以玩到每次進入形態都有所變化的「次元扭曲點」，以及要通過各式各樣任務的特別地下城「龍之聖域」！

・視覺效果與音效
保留了原作營造的氣氛，將視覺效果呈現得更為精美，也支援高解析度。
音效則在作曲家光田康典的監製下，重新收錄了所有樂曲。

・操作起來毫不礙手
改良了操作方式，讓玩家能更容易地進行遊戲。
不論是觸控操作、使用Apple TV或遊戲手把，都能夠舒適地進行遊戲。

・自動存檔
除了存檔點的「存檔」以及選單中的「中斷」以外，在地圖移動時也會自動儲存遊戲進度。
也支援雲端儲存。

--------------------------------------------

advisories: 偶而/輕微的卡通或幻想暴力
偶而/輕微的酒精、菸草或藥物使用或相關內容
tw.description:
■故事
帝國曆211年，人們發現了新大陸。
您將作為移民的其中一人，以走遍這座大陸為目標。
同時，在移民們的城鎮新都――艾列比亞度過每一天。

■遊戲特徵
【透過每日的工作培育角色】
本作品中有20種以上的職業，以及超過100種與職業相關的工作。
由於可在體力勞動中鍛鍊肌力，或在動腦時鍛鍊魔力，
因此藉由工作的選擇，可培育出自己喜好的角色。

【熟練地管理以攻略迷宮】
道具、糧食、以及露營道具。
將這些行李塞進容量有限的背包，向城鎮外頭出發。
途中不僅會和魔物戰鬥，也會遇到惡劣的天氣、糧食腐敗之類的狀況吧。
此時，要繼續前進？設置帳篷休息？還是鼓起勇氣撤退呢？
一路作出判斷，並不斷地開拓未知的大陸吧！

【全新的戰鬥系統要素「3個CHA」】
在活用職業和技能的傳統回合制指令式戰鬥中，
加入了和同伴合作非常重要的獨特系統。
CHANGE敵人的狀態，累積CHAIN，利用CHANCE來重創敵人吧！

tw.description:
------------------------------
・ This application requires approximately 2.55GB to download. Please be sure to allocate the necessary amount of time and space on your device before proceeding.
・ Only one download with a large amount of data will be required while progressing through the game.
・ Since it is a large application, it will take time to download. We strongly recommend connecting to Wi-Fi when downloading.
------------------------------

[Please read before playing]

* Entering or leaving vehicles such as cars and the Garden may occasionally get your character stuck between the vehicle and terrain features, or freeze the vehicle in place. This seems to happen more often when you leave your vehicle in close proximity to impassable terrain, or when you try to enter or leave your vehicle during certain scripted events. Currently, the only fix for this is to reload a previously saved game, so please make sure to save your progress often.

* Some locations may be difficult to navigate using the Speed Boost (x3). We advise you to turn off this feature in such cases.

* Make sure to check the FAQ section of our support page for solutions to common issues:
https://support.na.square-enix.com/main.php?la=1&id=442

We apologize for any inconvenience these issues may cause, and thank you again for your interest in our product.

■Summary
FINAL FANTASY VIII was first released on February 11, 1999. Beloved by fans, this title has garnered a great deal of popularity even compared to other installments in the FINAL FANTASY franchise, selling more than 9.6 million units worldwide. And now players can enjoy FINAL FANTASY VIII on their smartphone! With renewed character CG, the world of FINAL FANTASY VIII is now more beautiful than ever before.

This installment is a remaster of FINAL FANTASY VIII for PC. This application is a one-time purchase. There will be no additional charge incurred after downloading.

■Story
It is a time of war.
The Republic of Galbadia, under the influence of the sorceress Edea, mobilizes its great armies against the other nations of the world.
Squall and other members of SeeD, an elite mercenary force, join hands with Rinoa, a resistance fighter, to fight against Galbadia's tyrannical rule and to prevent Edea from fulfilling her ultimate goal.

■FINAL FANTASY VIII: Release Features
・Guardian Force（G.F.）
G.F. are summoned creatures in FFVIII used to protect the protagonists. Call upon them in battle to unleash their might and to increase their power alongside player characters. By junctioning G.F., players will be able to enjoy greater freedom in how they approach battles.

・Drawing
Obtain magic in FFVIII by drawing (extracting) it in battle. MP does not exist and players are limited to the number they have in their possession. Magic that has been extracted can be released on the spot or stocked for later use.

・ Junctioning
This system allows players to equip G.F. and stocked magic to characters in order to increase their power.

■ Additional Features
・ Battle Assist
Max out HP and ATB gauge during battle and activate Limit Breaks at any time.
・ No Encounters
Players can choose to turn Battle Encounters on or off.
・ 3x Speed
With the exception of certain cutscenes, players can choose to proceed through the game at 3x speed.


[Minimum Requirements]
iOS 15.0 or higher

tw.trackName: Good Maps - 登山路線與街景地圖
tw.releaseNotes: 全新升级
tw.description:
Good Maps —— 您的全球探索與專業戶外地圖
無論是足不出戶環遊世界名勝，還是穿越無訊號的荒野長線，Good Maps 都是您探索地球的可靠夥伴。我們將專業的徒步路線、3D 衛星地形、沉浸式街景與智能規劃引擎融為一體，為您提供清晰、直觀的地理探索體驗。
【核心功能特性】
• 沉浸式全球街景 —— 您的世界探索窗口。從萬里長城的蜿蜒磚石，到埃及金字塔的漫漫黃沙，都能身臨其境般細細觀看。無論是行前熟悉路況，還是閒暇時的精神漫遊，這裡都有看不完的風景。
• 全球徒步路線 —— 匯聚世界各地的戶外步道。從家門口的城市綠道，到高海拔的越野長線，這裡有一份持續更新的路線庫，陪您發掘下一次心動之旅。
• 多維地圖引擎 —— 自由切換多種地圖引擎。利用 Google 高清衛星圖 查看地表植被與道路細節，通過 Mapbox 3D 衛星地形圖 感受群山起伏與峽谷縱深，從容應對各種複雜地形。
• 全天候離線地圖 —— 專為無網環境準備。支持全球自定義區域的高速下載，即使深入沒有訊號的荒野，手機裡的地圖依然是您最可靠的嚮導。
• 智能路線規劃 —— 直覺化的拖拽交互。只需手指輕觸並拖拽，路徑就會自動吸附至真實路網與步道。秒級生成出行路線，讓規劃回歸簡單。
• 個人探索檔案 —— 建立您的專屬願望清單。將心儀的路線、難忘的街景和地點一鍵收藏，有條理地管理每一次出發與嚮往。

us.description:
Airport ground maneuvering simulation of more than 40 different airports including 
London Heathrow LHR, Philadelphia PHL, Miami Intl. MIA, Singapore, New York JFK, Las Vegas LAS, São Paulo GRU, Montreal YUL, Boston BOS,  and many more. 

Different versions of airports included:
- Play the simplified version, where the airport is scaled down to an easy playable experience.
- Play the real thing. Here the whole airport is in real size displayed, where all your skills are required.

Features
- Give pushback, taxi, holding and take-off clearances. 
- Handle emergencies and try to release all flights on time in order to release the next level.

From an easy single-runway operation at the beginning to demanding hub airports with multiple active runways where all your skills are required.

us.releaseNotes:
The paid DLC “The End Of Karma” is now available! A massive update that unveils the final chapter of the story, and the decisive battle against the ancient god He Luo!

【v3.1.2 Patch Notes】
*Please install the game directly and do not uninstall the old version, otherwise you will lose your local save files! It is recommended to use the cloud save function for backup~
*The offline feature is now available. You will only need to complete the login verification after the initial game installation. Subsequently, you are able to play in the offline mode.

-----------The following is the content of this update----------

DLC “The End Of Karma”: 
For ten years, 'Bi-an' slumbered in a dream of ashes while the malevolent Heluo deity was fully unleashed, turning the world into chaos. Under the arduous support of Linglong and others, the Heluo Resistance once saw a glimmer of hope, but everything seemed so fragile in the face of madness and despair… 
Now, 'Bi-an' has awakened from the endless nightmare and returned to the real world. He will embark on his journey once more, initiating the ultimate battle.

 【New Chapters】Five New Chapters, Intense Boss Challenges 
Five brand new chapters will lead you through a world that is both familiar and strange, gradually approaching the sacred grounds of the Snake Dynasty, hidden deep within the earth’s core a thousand years ago. Six formidable end-of-chapter Bosses will present new challenges to players! 

【New Sects】Three New Sects, Smooth Combat Experience
 Three new sects are introduced: Wheels of Solar and Lunar, Underworld Vidyaraja, and Soul Blade Shura, along with six sect skills, offering players a novel combat experience! 

【New Talents】System of All Things, Free Talisman Matching 
A new talent tree system allows limited talent points to dictate your growth strategy and choices, and an Infinite Mode that breaks through all limits! Coupled with the special rune - Time Talisman, the diverse entries and effects provide greater freedom and intensity for build combinations. 

【New Story】Abundant Story Segments, Three Endings for Your Choices 
The might of the ancient gods is not easily extinguished; your decisions will lead to three distinct endings! Traverse timelines, face various challenges, and find a way to save everyone! 

【New Adaptation】Mobile-Exclusive Features 
A new “Automatically activate Sword Sheathing” feature has been added for enhanced gameplay smoothness.
us.description:
While the rich stinks of meat and wine, the bones of the poor litter the roadside.
Great injustice often leads to strange occurrences
Snow in July can only be remedied through blood.

Warm Snow is a Roguelike action game with a background set in a dark fantasy world, where the eerie 'Warm Snow' holds sway. You will play as the Warrior 'Bi-an' on a crusade against the Five Great Clans, in order to save a world teetering on the brink of destruction.

【A Dark Tale of Sword and Snow】
A strange phenomenon appeared during the 27th Year of the Longwu Era. Snow fell from the sky, which was warm rather than cold to the touch, and did not melt.
People who breathed in the 'Warm Snow' lost their minds and became monsters. This phenomenon was later known as 'Warm Snow'.
Embark on a journey as Warrior 'Bi-an' to search for the truth behind the 'Warm Snow' and put an end to the this never-ending darkness.

【Countless Combinations】
Seven sects, varied Relics, unpredictable excaliburs, the game is full of Rogue-like elements which will keep each challenge in your journey fresh and unique.
Each time you venture into the world would be a whole-new experience, pick your favorite playing style and challenge yourself.

【Thrilling Flying Sword System】
Perform critical destruction with swords that flicker between shadow and light. Control your flying swords with different attributes, attack modes and Relic boosts.

【Reincarnate and Collect the Fragments of Truth】
You decide how you will grow stronger!
Boost your abilities with talent points that you can assign at will.
The truth about this world is hidden in the randomly dropped 'Memory Fragments'.
Are you ready to discover the secrets behind the Five Great Clans and reveal the truth of this world?

【Mobile Version Optimizations】
· Button customization and Auto-Dash: Adjust the position and size of buttons according to your preferences. Enable the Auto-Dash feature to start auto dashing with the left joystick.
· Adjust the viewing distance freely: Adjust the size of the screen display according to your preferences.
· Auto Enemy Tracking: Enable the Auto Enemy Tracking feature for a silky smooth combat experience.

Minimum device requirement: iOS 12.0 or higher. Memory requirement: 4GB. Available RAM: 4GB

SUPPORT
If you encounter any issues during the game, you can send us feedback via the in-game Customer Service Center.
Customer Service Email: warmsnowgh@bilibili.com
Official Site: https://warmsnow.biligames.com
Twitter：https://twitter.com/WarmSnowGame
Discord: https://discord.gg/gC2nRfEQ
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@warmsnow6951

us.description:
Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel
Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer?

Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game
Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures.

Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters
Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles.

Explore this monster adventure game
Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. 

Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter
Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer?

Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer
Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer?

Key Features:
- Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide
- 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve.
- No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame!
- A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay.
- Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements.
- Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo.
- Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards.
- Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game.
- Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs.

Why Players Love EvoCreo 2:
Fans of Monster-Catching games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home.
A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy.
Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure.

Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

us.description:
Tale of Immortal is an open-world sandbox based on Chinese mythology and cultivation. You will grow to become immortal, conquer the beasts from the Classic of Mountains and Season, make your choices carefully and grasp your own destiny.
【Ascend to the Top with Immortal Cultivation A Journey of a Lifetime】
Step into the enchanting world of the Tale of Immortal, where cultivation is an art that requires more than just financial means and help from fellow cultivators. To truly master it, one must possess a deep understanding of the craft and have access to the right cultivation venues. But that's not all—the journey is fraught with danger, as you'll face unpredictable monsters, crisis-ridden mystic realms, insurmountable barriers, and brilliant treasures waiting to be discovered.
【NPCs with a Life of Their Own AI-Driven Interactive Ecology】
Embrace a fully-realized NPC world, where each character is a unique entity with their own friends, family, and life trajectory— completely independent of your progress. However, if you choose to meddle, you certainly can!
【Surprising Encounters Await Experience a Fascinating Story】
Are you ready to embark on a thrilling adventure? One where you might become the hero who saves the day and wins the heart of the love of your life? Or maybe you're looking to stir up some jealousy in your crush and have them fight for your affection? How about fulfilling a fifty-year-old promise or getting caught up in the struggle of a mysterious organization? Perhaps you'll uncover a long-forgotten treasure, only to have it snatched away by a cunning adversary?
【From Conquering the Territories to Uniting the World Building the Strongest Sect】
Do you want to take your sect to new heights of power and glory? We've got the ultimate sect management gameplay that lets you experience the full range of sect life: from humble disciple to mighty sect master. Join a massive sect and work your way up from the bottom, or take on the challenge of leading a fallen sect back to prominence.
【Martial Arts, Monsters, and Immortals Building Your Unique School】
To embark on an epic adventure, you need to hone your skills and become a true warrior.

Start by building a solid foundation of cultivation. Your mind skills are crucial to success, so focus on cultivating a powerful mindset. From there, you can delve into martial and spiritual skills to take your abilities to the next level. As you explore, keep an eye out for opportunities to create edges with your motion and special skills. And don't forget to tap into your ultimate skills to save the day when necessary.
【The Triad of Power Artifact, Alchemy, and Talismans】
Sharpen your skills and harness the power of tools!

At the start, you get to choose from three formidable weapons, each offering a distinct cultivation system. The Bagua Jade grants you the ability to revive yourself and your chosen ally, the Eye of Providence allows you to steal Beast Skills and gain unparalleled insights into the world, and the Mythical Gourd empowers you to capture a Boss and enlist it as your loyal sidekick: command it to fight by your side or to search for treasure on your behalf.

us.description:
"Cytus II" is a music rhythm game created by Rayark Games. It's our fourth rhythm game title, following the footsteps of three global successes, "Cytus", "DEEMO" and "VOEZ". This sequel to "Cytus" brings back the original staff and is a product of hardwork and devotion. 

In the future, humans have redefined internet development and connections. We can now easily sync the real world with the internet world, changing life as we have known for thousands of years. 

In the mega virtual internet space cyTus, there exists a mysterious DJ legend Æsir. His music has an irresistible charm; people fall madly in love with his music. Rumor has it that every note and beat of his music hits the audiences in 
the depths of their souls. 

One day, Æsir, who had never shown his face before, suddenly announced that he will be holding the first mega virtual concert —— Æsir-FEST and will invite a top idol singer and a popular DJ as opening performances. The instant the ticket sales began, an unprecedented rush occurred. Everyone wanted to see Æsir's real face. 

On the day of the FEST,  millions of people were connected to the event. At one hour before the event started,  the previous world record for most simultaneous connection was smashed. The whole city was on its feet, waiting for Æsir to descent from the skies...

Game Features:

- The unique "Active Judgement Line" rhythm game playstyle
Tap the notes as the judgement line hits them to achieve a high score. Through five different kinds of notes and the judgement line that actively adjusts its speed according to the beat, the gameplay experience is further combined with the music. Players can easily immerse themselves in the songs. 

- A total of 250+ high-quality songs (50+ in base game, 200+ as IAP)
The game includes songs by composers from all across the world, Japan, Korea, the US, Europe, Taiwan and more. Through the characters, players get to play songs from different genres including but not limited to: electronic, rock and classical. We are confident that this game will live up to the hype and expectations.

- Over 800 different charts
Over 800 different charts designed, from easy to hard. The rich game content can satisfy players of different levels. Experience exciting challenges and enjoyment through the sensation of your fingertips. 

- Explore the virtual internet world with the game's characters
The one-of-a-kind story system "iM" will lead the players and the in-game characters to slowly piece together the story and world behind "Cytus II". Reveal the truth of the story with a rich, cinematic visual experience. 

PAFF (CV:上坂すみれ Sumire Uesaka)
NEKO (CV:花守ゆみり Yumiri Hanamori)
Xenon (CV:関智一 Tomokazu Seki)
ConneR (CV:竹内栄治 Eiji Takeuchi)
Cherry (CV:ファイルーズあい Fairouz Ai)
Nora (CV:石見舞菜香 Manaka Iwami)
Ivy (CV:河瀬茉希 Maki Kawase)
Vanessa (CV:楠木ともり Tomori Kusunoki)
Rin (CV:能登麻美子 Mamiko Noto)

*************************************************************
Cytus II will perform a connection authentication for its In-app purchases from time to time.
If you discover during the authentication period that your IAP was lost due to your device not connecting to the internet, 
please make sure your device is connected to the internet. Afterwards, click "Restore Purchases" to recover your IAP.
*************************************************************
※ This game contains mild violence and vulgar language. Suitable for users age 15 and above.
※ This game contains additional in-app purchases. Please purchased base on personal interest and ability. Do not overspend.
※ Please pay attention to your game time and avoid addiction.
※ Please do not use this game for gambling or other illegal purposes.

us.description:
'Call of Knights' is a pixel-style RPG card game developed by Olive Panda Studio. The game consists of two main parts: 'Song of the Knights' and 'Shining Stars' . Players can access the full game content through free download and optional in-app purchases.




【In-App Purchases】

Full Content Unlock: $8.99 USD
Story Mode of 'Song of the Knight': $4.99 USD
Free Mode of 'Shining Stars': $4.99 USD
Both modes support free trial before purchase. 
'Song of the Knights' can be played for free up to the end of Chapter 2, while 'Shining Stars' can be experienced freely for one in-game year.
Note: Prices may vary depending on local exchange rates.




Song of the Knights:
This story mode is adapted from Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz's 'The Teutonic Knights'. The gameplay combines card-based battles with RPG character development, featuring a companion skill combo system where different cards trigger unique partner skills, allowing players to build various strategic decks. Along the journey, players will meet and recruit many companions, embarking on a grand and epic adventure.




Shining Stars:

Set in the magical continent of Antana, this mode features six culturally distinct nations. Players take on the role of a minor lord from one of the kingdoms. As the demon realm prepares to invade, players must travel the land, recruit companions, form their own knight order, and grow stronger to defend the front lines of humanity.




【Device Support】
iOS 10.0 or later
Devices with 3GB RAM or more
iPhone 7 or newer
iPad Air 3 or newer

us.description:
"Altitude Compass" - An ad-free compass tool

The "Altitude Compass" app is a clean and ad-free compass tool that displays environmental information such as altitude, atmospheric pressure, latitude, and longitude for your current location. It offers the following features:

1. Switchable Data Sources: Choose between GPS information or the device's altimeter as the source for altitude data. Requires iPhone 12 or newer models with iOS 15 or later.

2. Real-time Camera Support: Capture photos with environmental information and date watermarks. HDR photo capture is supported on iPhone 12 or newer models with iOS 17 or later. (Available on iPhone only).

3. Additional Tools: Access a level gauge, speedometer, and calculate sunrise and sunset times based on your current location. Toggle their display on the compass panel.

4. Customizable UI: Customize the app's appearance with dark and light modes, global font replacement, and more.

5. Display Modes: Easily switch between different display modes for altitude, atmospheric pressure, and location data by tapping on the text at the bottom of the app.

6. Widget Supported: View altitude at home screen, lock screen or standby mode.

7. No Ads, Subscriptions, or Privacy Concerns: Enjoy an ad-free experience without annoying ads, subscription fees, or any privacy concerns. No data collection.

8. Lightweight and Fast: The app has a small file size, fast performance, and minimal resource usage. It can be downloaded, installed, and used without any burden.

Permission Requests:

1. Network Access: The app can function without internet access for most features. Network access is used for reverse geocoding (converting coordinates to place names) and loading maps on the last panel.

2. Photo Library Access: The app only requires permission to write to the photo library. Users on iOS 14 and above do not need to manually select photos for the app to access.

3. Location Permission: Precise location permission is necessary to obtain accurate altitude data from GPS.

4. Health and Fitness Permission:  Reading atmospheric pressure requires this permission since iOS 17.4

us.description:
A remodeled 2D take on the fourth game in the world-renowned FINAL FANTASY series! Enjoy the timeless story told through charming retro graphics. All the magic of the original, with improved ease of play.

The Kingdom of Baron sent their elite airship fleet, the Red Wings, to attack the surrounding countries. Distressed by his mission, Cecil, a dark knight and captain of the Red Wings, decides to fight against the tyrannical Baron with his trusted friend and his paramour at his side. In his search for the crystals, Cecil must travel over land, under the ground, to the Land of Summons, and even to the moon. Join forces with Kain the dragoon, Rosa the white mage, Rydia the summoner, and many more skilled allies.

FFIV is the first title to introduce the dynamic "Active Time Battle" system, where time moves even during battle, giving the players an exciting sense of urgency.Thanks to the wide appeal of the game, this revolutionary system would be implemented in many future titles in the series.

Witness the dramatic story and dynamic battles in this fourth installment of the FINAL FANTASY series!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

■ Beautifully revived with new graphics and sound!
・Universally updated 2D pixel graphics, including the iconic FINAL FANTASY character pixel designs created by Kazuko Shibuya, the original artist and current collaborator.
・Beautifully rearranged soundtrack in a faithful FINAL FANTASY style, overseen by original composer Nobuo Uematsu.

■Improved gameplay!
・Including modernized UI, auto-battle options, and more.
・Also supports game pad controls, making it possible to play using a dedicated gamepad UI when connecting a gamepad to your device.
・Switch the soundtrack between the rearranged version, created for the pixel remaster, or the original version, capturing the sound of the original game.
・Now possible to switch between different fonts, including the default font and a pixel-based font based on the atmosphere of the original game.
・Additional boost features to expand gameplay options, including switching off random encounters and adjusting experience gained multipliers between 0 and 4.
・Dive into the world of the game with supplemental extras like the bestiary, illustration gallery, and music player.

*One-time purchase. The app will not require any additional payments to play through the game after the initial purchase and subsequent download.

*Please be aware that users may experience problems, such as exceptionally slow running speeds, if running this application on devices other than those outlined in the recommended hardware section.  Such devices are not suited to playing this game and there is a chance of unforeseen errors occurring if running it on them.


Outline

The smash hit RPG: Final Fantasy VII, which has sold over 11,000,000 units* worldwide, finally arrives on iOS!
*Total includes both packaged sales and downloads.

The first Final Fantasy to feature 3D backgrounds and CG movie scenes, this dramatic tale continues to be loved by numerous fans around the world. Battle stages also appear in full 3D for the first time, bringing an even greater sense of awe and spectacle to combat!

Customize your characters in any way you like using the fantastic “material” system that allows endless combinations of spells and abilities.

This product is a port based on Final Fantasy VII for PC (No changes or additions have been made to the story). 


Story

With its unshakeable monopoly over Mako energy production, the evil Shinra Electric Power Company holds tight to the reigns of world power.
One day, a Mako reactor serving the sprawling metropolis of Midgar is attacked and destroyed in a bombing raid by a revolutionary group calling themselves Avalanche. 
Cloud Strife, a former member of Shinra’s elite “Soldier” unit takes part in the raid as a mercenary hired by Avalanche and sets events in motion that will draw him and his friends into an epic struggle for the fate of the planet itself…


Special features for the iOS edition 

- Play using a simple and comfortable virtual controller designed not to obscure the action, choosing between virtual analogue or fixed 4-way digital control pad options. The opacity of on-screen controls can also be adjusted from the Config Menu.

- Two new features to make play easier and more convenient!
The iOS edition also includes an option to turn enemy encounters off on the world and area maps (will not skip event battles) and a Max Stats command to become all-powerful in the blink of an eye.


Major game controls

Movement: Virtual joypad (Select between analogue and digital modes)
Menu navigation: Fixed digital buttons
Confirm: A button
Cancel: B button
Open menu: Y button

us.description:
“Trials of Mana,” the hit console game with over 1 million copies and downloads sold worldwide...is coming to a smartphone near you!

Fun for longtime fans of the Mana Series and new players alike!

◆Story
When the world was shrouded in darkness, the Goddess of Mana drew forth the Sword of Mana to smite the eight Benevodons, monsters of destruction. She sealed the horrors inside the eight Mana Stones, bringing the realm back from the brink.

Weak from rebuilding the world, the Goddess changed into a tree and fell fast asleep for years. However, the forces of evil sought to free the Benevodons to gain control of the world. They started a terrible war to further their plot and destabilize the kingdoms.
Peace was at an end.

Mana itself began to disappear from the world and the Mana Tree to wither...

◆Playable Characters
Players start their adventure by selecting three of the six main characters. The overlapping story of interwoven destinies changes depending on who you choose as your main character and companions!

◆Graphics
See the spectacular world of Mana in full 3D render! Scenes and characters from the original game now in beautifully detailed graphics.

◆Battle System
Use the dynamic fighting system to evade enemies and fight back with aerial and combo attacks. Utilize the signature ring menus of the Mana Series and new shortcut commands.

◆Powering Up Characters
Switch to light or dark classes to strengthen your characters and change their look. In this remake, there’s also a newly added Class 4. With over 300 different kinds of abilities available, there are many different ways to train and power up your characters.

◆Difficulty
You have the option of four difficulty settings: Beginner, Easy, Normal, and Hard. The Beginner setting allows players to resume in the same spot no matter how many times they get a game over. If you find action games hard or want to focus on the story, select this difficulty.

◆Soundtrack
The 60-song soundtrack features arrangements overseen by the original composer, Hiroki Kikuta. Players can switch the BGM to the new version or the SNES version.

◆Voiceover
Full voiceover in English and Japanese! The characters in your party determine which extra conversations happen during your journey.

◆New Game Plus
After you beat the game once, you will unlock new storylines for your party members. You can unlock harder difficulties like Expert and the No Future after playing through the new storylines.

◆New Features
Included in the game is the option to play through flashbacks for each character in your party. You’ll also see a familiar Mana Series face when searching for Li’l Cactus during your adventures. Plus, there are additions like a new type of item seed and the autosave feature.

◆Smartphone-Specific
・Menus are touch-operated. Control characters with the directional pad overlay display.
・Newly added features like auto-target, auto-camera, and auto-battle.
・Graphic quality options available.
・Cloud save compatible.
・Can obtain the starting gear “Rabite Adornment,“ which increases the EXP gained in battle up to level 17 and “Silktail Adornment,” which increases the amount of lucre gained in battle up to level 17.

【App Download】
・This application is approximately 6.7GB in total. Please ensure you have the necessary storage space available on your device before purchasing.
・After starting the game, a large portion of data must be downloaded after defeating the first boss. You can also select “Download” on the title screen to download the entire app at once.
・A Wi-Fi connection is highly recommended when downloading the app. 

【Players】
1

【Recommended Devices】
iPhone 7 and above

Selling over 5.5million copies since its release in 2000, FINAL FANTASY IX proudly returns on iOS! 
Now you can relive the adventures of Zidane and his crew in the palm of your hands!

Enjoy this classic FINAL FANTASY experience with no additional fees or purchases.


■Story
Zidane and the Tantalus Theater Troupe have kidnapped Princess Garnet, the heir of Alexandria. 
To their surprise, however, the princess herself yearned to escape the castle. 
Through a series of unusual circumstances, she and her personal guard, Steiner, fall in with Zidane and set out on an incredible journey. 
Meeting unforgettable characters like Vivi and Quina along the way, they learn about themselves, the secrets of the Crystal, and a malevolent force that threatens to destroy their world.


■Gameplay Features

・Abilities
Learn new abilities by equipping items. 
When fully mastered, these abilities can be used even without equipping items, allowing for nearly endless customization options.

・Trance
Fill your Trance gauge as you sustain hits in battle. 
When fully charged, your characters will enter Trance mode, granting them powerful new skills!

・Synthesis
Never let items go to waste. Combine two items or pieces of equipment together and make better, stronger items!

・Minigames
Whether it's Chocobo Hot and Cold, Jump Rope, or Tetra Master, there are plenty of minigames to enjoy when you're not off saving the world. 
You can even earn special item rewards!

・Achievements

・High-definition movies and character models.

us.description:
Final Fantasy III -- now on iPhone!

When darkness falls and the land is robbed of light, four youths are chosen by the crystals to embark upon a journey to save the world.

FINAL FANTASY III was the first title in the FINAL FANTASY series to become a million-seller, establishing once and for all that Square Enix's classic RPG saga was here to stay.

A hallmark of innovation for the entire series, FINAL FANTASY III incorporates not only a job system that lets characters change classes at any time to the ability to summon powerful creatures such as Shiva and Bahamut.

The 3D remake of FINAL FANTASY III, with fully-rendered 3D graphics, duplicated the original's success.

- The four protagonists have been completely redesigned and new scenarios have been added.

- The 3D remake has really brought the cutscenes and battles to life.

- The Job system has been improved to bring out its best and most unique aspects, resulting in a more balanced game that is easy to enjoy.

- New save functions, including autosave, allow for players to quit the game at any time without fear of losing their progress.

--------------------------------------------

Aditionally, the smartphone version has been improved to include the following:

- High resolution graphics and retouched cutscenes.

- Smooth, intuitive touch-panel controls specifically tailored to improve the gaming experience.

- Gallery Mode, where players can view  illustrations from the game  or listen to the soundtrack, has been added.

- New visual designs for the Job Mastery Cards and the Mognet .

us.description:
Journey to the forgotten past, to the far future, and to the end of time. A big adventure to save the planet, now begins…

CHRONO TRIGGER is the timeless role-playing classic developed by the ‘Dream Team’ of DRAGON QUEST creator Yuji Horii, Dragon Ball creator Akira Toriyama, and the creators of FINAL FANTASY. As the story unfolds, embark on a journey to different eras: the present, the middle ages, the future, prehistory, and ancient times! Whether you're a first-time player or a longtime fan, this epic quest to save a planet's future promises hours of enthralling adventure!

As the definitive version of CHRONO TRIGGER, not only have the controls been updated, the graphics and sound have also been revamped to make your adventure even more fun and enjoyable to play. To complete your journey, also included is the mysterious ‘Dimensional Vortex’ dungeon and the forgotten ‘Lost Sanctum’ dungeon. Meet the challenges presented to you and long-lost secrets may be revealed...

Story:
A chance encounter amid the festivities of Guardia's Millennial Fair in Leene Square introduces our young hero, Crono, to a girl by the name of Marle. Deciding to explore the fair together, the two soon find themselves at an exhibition of the Telepod, the latest invention by Crono's longtime friend Lucca. Marle, fearless and brimming with curiosity, volunteers to assist in a demonstration. An unanticipated malfunction, however, sends her hurtling through a rift in the dimensions. Taking hold of the girl's pendant, Crono bravely follows in pursuit. But the world into which he emerges is the one of four centuries before. Journey to the forgotten past, the distant future, and even to the very End of Time. The epic quest to save a planet's future makes history once again.

Key features:

Active Time Battle Version 2
During battle, time will not stop, and you can enter commands when the character's gauge is full. The enemies' positions will change as time passes, so choose your actions based on any given situation.

‘Tech’ moves and combos
During battle, you can unleash special ‘Tech’ moves, including abilities and/or magic and characters can combine these abilities to unleash all new combo attacks which are unique to them. There are over 50 different types of combos that you can execute between two and three characters!

Experience the 'Dimensional Vortex' and the 'Lost Sanctum' dungeons
The Dimensional Vortex: a mysterious, ever-changing dungeon existing outside of space and time. What wonders await you at its center? The Lost Sanctum: enigmatic gates in prehistoric and medieval times will lead you to these forgotten chambers. Meet the challenges presented to you and long-lost secrets may be revealed...

Graphics and sound
While keeping the atmosphere of the original, the graphics have been updated in higher resolution. As for the sound and music, under the supervision of composer Yasunori Mitsuda, all songs have been updated for an even more immersive gameplay experience.

Autosave
In addition to saving at a save point or choosing to quit from the menu, your progress is saved automatically while traversing the map.

--------------------------------------------

us.description:
■Story
In the year 211 of the Imperial Era, a new continent was discovered. Explore its every last corner as a settler of Antoecia, while living your life to the fullest in the city of Erebia.

■Features 
• Character growth through everyday work
VARIOUS DAYLIFE features over 20 job classes and more than 100 types of work for those jobs to perform. Since you’ll be able to increase your strength through physical labor or improve your magic with more mentally taxing tasks, you can shape your character how you see fit depending on your choice of work.

• Overcome dungeons with skilled management
Choose what limited rations, items and camping gear you can pack in your bags as you leave the safety of the city to confront the unknown. You'll battle monsters, bad weather, and food spoilage out on the various frontiers of Antoecia. When the going gets tough, will you press onward, or retreat to explore another day?
You’ll have to make these kinds of decisions as you trailblaze a way across the continent, where none have trod before.

• Innovative Battle System – The Three CHAs
Introducing a twist to the traditional job-and-ability, turn-based battle, with a unique system that relies heavily on working together with your allies. CHANGE your foes' conditions, build up a CHAIN of attacks and seize your CHANCE at inflicting heavy damage!

us.description:
------------------------------
・ This application requires approximately 2.55GB to download. Please be sure to allocate the necessary amount of time and space on your device before proceeding.
・ Only one download with a large amount of data will be required while progressing through the game.
・ Since it is a large application, it will take time to download. We strongly recommend connecting to Wi-Fi when downloading.
------------------------------

[Please read before playing]

* Entering or leaving vehicles such as cars and the Garden may occasionally get your character stuck between the vehicle and terrain features, or freeze the vehicle in place. This seems to happen more often when you leave your vehicle in close proximity to impassable terrain, or when you try to enter or leave your vehicle during certain scripted events. Currently, the only fix for this is to reload a previously saved game, so please make sure to save your progress often.

* Some locations may be difficult to navigate using the Speed Boost (x3). We advise you to turn off this feature in such cases.

* Make sure to check the FAQ section of our support page for solutions to common issues:
https://support.na.square-enix.com/main.php?la=1&id=442

We apologize for any inconvenience these issues may cause, and thank you again for your interest in our product.

■Summary
FINAL FANTASY VIII was first released on February 11, 1999. Beloved by fans, this title has garnered a great deal of popularity even compared to other installments in the FINAL FANTASY franchise, selling more than 9.6 million units worldwide. And now players can enjoy FINAL FANTASY VIII on their smartphone! With renewed character CG, the world of FINAL FANTASY VIII is now more beautiful than ever before.

This installment is a remaster of FINAL FANTASY VIII for PC. This application is a one-time purchase. There will be no additional charge incurred after downloading.

■Story
It is a time of war.
The Republic of Galbadia, under the influence of the sorceress Edea, mobilizes its great armies against the other nations of the world.
Squall and other members of SeeD, an elite mercenary force, join hands with Rinoa, a resistance fighter, to fight against Galbadia's tyrannical rule and to prevent Edea from fulfilling her ultimate goal.

■FINAL FANTASY VIII: Release Features
・Guardian Force（G.F.）
G.F. are summoned creatures in FFVIII used to protect the protagonists. Call upon them in battle to unleash their might and to increase their power alongside player characters. By junctioning G.F., players will be able to enjoy greater freedom in how they approach battles.

・Drawing
Obtain magic in FFVIII by drawing (extracting) it in battle. MP does not exist and players are limited to the number they have in their possession. Magic that has been extracted can be released on the spot or stocked for later use.

・ Junctioning
This system allows players to equip G.F. and stocked magic to characters in order to increase their power.

■ Additional Features
・ Battle Assist
Max out HP and ATB gauge during battle and activate Limit Breaks at any time.
・ No Encounters
Players can choose to turn Battle Encounters on or off.
・ 3x Speed
With the exception of certain cutscenes, players can choose to proceed through the game at 3x speed.


[Minimum Requirements]
iOS 15.0 or higher

us.releaseNotes: All New Upgrade
us.description:
Good Maps — Your Global Exploration & Professional Outdoor Map
Whether you're exploring world-famous landmarks from home or trekking through off-the-grid wilderness trails, Good Maps is your reliable partner for discovering the Earth. Combining professional hiking trails, 3D satellite topography, immersive Street View, and an intelligent routing engine, we offer a clear and intuitive geographical exploration experience.

[Core Features]

- Immersive Global Street View — Your window to explore the world. From the winding bricks of the Great Wall to the sands of the Pyramids, view every detail as if you were there. Ideal for pre-trip preparation or everyday virtual travel.

- Global Hiking Trails — A vast collection of outdoor trails worldwide. From local city greenways to high-altitude wilderness treks, easily discover your next adventure with our growing route library.

- Multi-Engine Maps — Switch freely between professional map data. Use Google High-Res Satellite to inspect surface details and Mapbox 3D Terrain to visualize mountain ridges and valley depths, easily mastering complex landscapes.

- Smart Route Planner — Intuitive drag-and-drop planning. Tap and sketch your path; the engine instantly snaps to real-world roads and trails, generating accurate routes without the hassle.

- Pro-Grade Data & Search — Access real-time elevation profiles, accurate distance estimates, and key waypoints. Find exactly what you need with comprehensive POI data, from wilderness refuge camps to city supply stops.

- Offline Maps for Extremes — Built for off-the-grid environments. Download custom regions worldwide to ensure you always have a reliable guide, even deep in the wilderness without a signal.

- Your Exploration Archive — Build a personalized wishlist. Save favorite trails, memorable street views, and key locations with one tap, effortlessly managing your past and future journeys.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

tr.description:
PowNap is a smart power-nap app for Apple Watch.  
It uses your heart rate to detect recovery and wake you at the right moment.

Wake up when your body is ready — not when a timer ends.

You start the nap.  
PowNap handles detection and wake-up based on your physiology.

Two Modes

Power Nap  
15, 20, or 25 minutes  
• May end earlier if your body recovers  
• Ends at the selected time at the latest  

Infinity  
No fixed duration  
• Ends when your body shows signs of recovery or light sleep  
• Ideal when you don’t want a fixed limit  

Calm. Precise. Distraction-free.

• Detects relaxation via heart rate  
• Wakes you with gentle vibration  
• No countdown pressure  
• Subtle progress indicators designed to reduce timer pressure  
• Runs fully offline on your Apple Watch  

Tap “Start” — PowNap takes care of the rest.

Adjustable

• Vibration strength  
• Sensitivity  
• Custom nap durations  

Private & Local

• One-time purchase — no subscription  
• No ads, no account, no tracking  

All processing happens on your watch.

Apple Health access is required to read your heart rate.  
PowNap uses a “Mind & Body” workout for this.

Important

• Not a medical device  
• Uses a “Mind & Body” workout for heart-rate tracking (required by watchOS)  
• Activity Rings may be affected  

Buy once.  
No conditions.  
Just calm, focused recovery.

Apple Watch Compatibility

Requires Apple Watch Series 4 or newer (including SE).  
Apple Watch Series 3 and earlier are not supported.

tr.description:
Run Japan's trains!

No railroad knowledge is required to play "Tokyo Train!".
This game is a brain game with simple rules but requires a lot of brain power.


Customers are waiting at the station for the trains to arrive to take them to their destinations.
Start the trains and transport your customers.

You will earn money for every passenger who boards a train.
Adjust the interval between runs and the number of cars to achieve the highest revenue.
Departing trains costs money. If you send out too many trains and the boarding rate drops, you will lose your revenue.

The operation method is very easy and the rules are simple.
All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time.
As the game progresses, express fares will also appear.

No technical knowledge is required at all.
Both people who like trains and people who like games can quickly understand and enjoy the game.

There are no in-app purchases. There are no ads.
Please concentrate on the game.
Share your operating results on social media.

tr.releaseNotes: Changed the game titles for some languages.
tr.description:
Run Japanese trains!

・Simple brain game
"Tokyo Train! 2" is a brain game with simple rules. No expertise required.
Train fans, game fans, everyone can enjoy it.

・To everyone who will become a train dispatcher
In the morning in Japan, customers are waiting for the arrival of the train to go to work.
Let's start the train and transport the customers.

・Goal of the game
Japanese railway companies are for-profit organizations. Let's aim for high operating profit!

・How to make profit
Fare revenue - Departure cost = Operating profit.

Fare revenue is generated when passengers board at a station.
Example) If two passengers board a train at a station with a fare of 20, the company receives 40.

Departure costs are charged according to the number of cars when the train departs.
Example) 30 for a 2-car train, 40 for a 4-car train, and 70 for a 10-car train.

One person can ride in one car.
Fare revenue is generated when customers board the train.
Adjust the driving schedule and the number of vehicles to aim for the highest profit.
Departure costs. If you run too many trains and the occupancy rate drops, you'll lose revenue.

・How to operate
The game is very easy to operate and the rules are simple.
All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time.
As the game progresses, various variations such as express trains and transfer stations will appear.

・Volume
Enjoy over 50 routes.
Please experience the wide variety of transportation strategies of Japanese railway companies.
No ads, no charges.

・No ads, no billing
Please concentrate on the game. Children can also enjoy the game.
Share your results on Social Media.

・Train lines you can play with
JR East Japan JR Tokai JR West Japan JR Kyushu Tobu Tokyu Seibu Keio Keikyu Keihan Hankyu Hanshin Kintetsu Meitetsu Odakyu Nankai Seitetsu Sotetsu Keisei Tokyo Metro Osaka Metro Toei Subway Tsukuba Express

・Capacity is about 130MB
The storage burden is also small. There is no heavy processing at all.

tr.description:
Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel
Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer?

Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game
Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures.

Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters
Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles.

Explore this monster adventure game
Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. 

Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter
Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer?

Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer
Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer?

Key Features:
- Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide
- 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve.
- No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame!
- A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay.
- Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements.
- Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo.
- Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards.
- Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game.
- Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs.

Why Players Love EvoCreo 2:
Fans of Monster games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home.
A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy.
Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure.

Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

tr.description:
Tale of Immortal is an open-world sandbox based on Chinese mythology and cultivation. You will grow to become immortal, conquer the beasts from the Classic of Mountains and Season, make your choices carefully and grasp your own destiny.
【Ascend to the Top with Immortal Cultivation A Journey of a Lifetime】
Step into the enchanting world of the Tale of Immortal, where cultivation is an art that requires more than just financial means and help from fellow cultivators. To truly master it, one must possess a deep understanding of the craft and have access to the right cultivation venues. But that's not all—the journey is fraught with danger, as you'll face unpredictable monsters, crisis-ridden mystic realms, insurmountable barriers, and brilliant treasures waiting to be discovered.
【NPCs with a Life of Their Own AI-Driven Interactive Ecology】
Embrace a fully-realized NPC world, where each character is a unique entity with their own friends, family, and life trajectory— completely independent of your progress. However, if you choose to meddle, you certainly can!
【Surprising Encounters Await Experience a Fascinating Story】
Are you ready to embark on a thrilling adventure? One where you might become the hero who saves the day and wins the heart of the love of your life? Or maybe you're looking to stir up some jealousy in your crush and have them fight for your affection? How about fulfilling a fifty-year-old promise or getting caught up in the struggle of a mysterious organization? Perhaps you'll uncover a long-forgotten treasure, only to have it snatched away by a cunning adversary?
【From Conquering the Territories to Uniting the World Building the Strongest Sect】
Do you want to take your sect to new heights of power and glory? We've got the ultimate sect management gameplay that lets you experience the full range of sect life: from humble disciple to mighty sect master. Join a massive sect and work your way up from the bottom, or take on the challenge of leading a fallen sect back to prominence.
【Martial Arts, Monsters, and Immortals Building Your Unique School】
To embark on an epic adventure, you need to hone your skills and become a true warrior.

Start by building a solid foundation of cultivation. Your mind skills are crucial to success, so focus on cultivating a powerful mindset. From there, you can delve into martial and spiritual skills to take your abilities to the next level. As you explore, keep an eye out for opportunities to create edges with your motion and special skills. And don't forget to tap into your ultimate skills to save the day when necessary.
【The Triad of Power Artifact, Alchemy, and Talismans】
Sharpen your skills and harness the power of tools!

At the start, you get to choose from three formidable weapons, each offering a distinct cultivation system. The Bagua Jade grants you the ability to revive yourself and your chosen ally, the Eye of Providence allows you to steal Beast Skills and gain unparalleled insights into the world, and the Mythical Gourd empowers you to capture a Boss and enlist it as your loyal sidekick: command it to fight by your side or to search for treasure on your behalf.

tr.description:
Do you love adorable cats? Want better focus and less reliance on your phone? Let CatBox cats accompany you, training your concentration and building disciplined habits, growing with you along the way!

CatBox Flow is the second app in the official CatBox series. It's a cat-themed focus and meditation app that hopes to have cute cats by your side to help manage your time. In a scenified space, put down your phone and focus on what matters most.


Companion-style Focus, where the cats stay with you and protect your time!


Companion-style focus:
• Take back control of your time while focusing. 
• Cats will stay with you and protect your time. 
• After 30 seconds, the gravity sensor will trigger a stop setting to help the cat guard your time. 
• Various cats are available for subscription and individual purchase!

Scenified space: 
• Immersive, scene-based spaces with cats to focus on what matters. 
• Customize different times, scenes, and themes to build personal habits. 
• A wide range of scenes are available for subscription or individual purchase.

Multidimensional data review: 
• Detailed focus data with the cats by your side to review. 
• Unlocking cats and scenes lets different cats protect different data for you.

Master, put down your phone now and let the cats accompany you in focusing!

Future Features:

Deep focus mode
Cat training system

tr.description:
"Cytus II" is a music rhythm game created by Rayark Games. It's our fourth rhythm game title, following the footsteps of three global successes, "Cytus", "DEEMO" and "VOEZ". This sequel to "Cytus" brings back the original staff and is a product of hardwork and devotion. 

In the future, humans have redefined internet development and connections. We can now easily sync the real world with the internet world, changing life as we have known for thousands of years. 

In the mega virtual internet space cyTus, there exists a mysterious DJ legend Æsir. His music has an irresistible charm; people fall madly in love with his music. Rumor has it that every note and beat of his music hits the audiences in 
the depths of their souls. 

One day, Æsir, who had never shown his face before, suddenly announced that he will be holding the first mega virtual concert —— Æsir-FEST and will invite a top idol singer and a popular DJ as opening performances. The instant the ticket sales began, an unprecedented rush occurred. Everyone wanted to see Æsir's real face. 

On the day of the FEST,  millions of people were connected to the event. At one hour before the event started,  the previous world record for most simultaneous connection was smashed. The whole city was on its feet, waiting for Æsir to descent from the skies...

Game Features:

- The unique "Active Judgement Line" rhythm game playstyle
Tap the notes as the judgement line hits them to achieve a high score. Through five different kinds of notes and the judgement line that actively adjusts its speed according to the beat, the gameplay experience is further combined with the music. Players can easily immerse themselves in the songs. 

- A total of 250+ high-quality songs (50+ in base game, 200+ as IAP)
The game includes songs by composers from all across the world, Japan, Korea, the US, Europe, Taiwan and more. Through the characters, players get to play songs from different genres including but not limited to: electronic, rock and classical. We are confident that this game will live up to the hype and expectations.

- Over 800 different charts
Over 800 different charts designed, from easy to hard. The rich game content can satisfy players of different levels. Experience exciting challenges and enjoyment through the sensation of your fingertips. 

- Explore the virtual internet world with the game's characters
The one-of-a-kind story system "iM" will lead the players and the in-game characters to slowly piece together the story and world behind "Cytus II". Reveal the truth of the story with a rich, cinematic visual experience. 

PAFF (CV:上坂すみれ Sumire Uesaka)
NEKO (CV:花守ゆみり Yumiri Hanamori)
Xenon (CV:関智一 Tomokazu Seki)
ConneR (CV:竹内栄治 Eiji Takeuchi)
Cherry (CV:ファイルーズあい Fairouz Ai)
Nora (CV:石見舞菜香 Manaka Iwami)
Ivy (CV:河瀬茉希 Maki Kawase)
Vanessa (CV:楠木ともり Tomori Kusunoki)
Rin (CV:能登麻美子 Mamiko Noto)

*************************************************************
Cytus II will perform a connection authentication for its In-app purchases from time to time.
If you discover during the authentication period that your IAP was lost due to your device not connecting to the internet, 
please make sure your device is connected to the internet. Afterwards, click "Restore Purchases" to recover your IAP.
*************************************************************
※ This game contains mild violence and vulgar language. Suitable for users age 15 and above.
※ This game contains additional in-app purchases. Please purchased base on personal interest and ability. Do not overspend.
※ Please pay attention to your game time and avoid addiction.
※ Please do not use this game for gambling or other illegal purposes.

tr.description:
'Call of Knights' is a pixel-style RPG card game developed by Olive Panda Studio. The game consists of two main parts: 'Song of the Knights' and 'Shining Stars' . Players can access the full game content through free download and optional in-app purchases.




【In-App Purchases】

Full Content Unlock: $8.99 USD
Story Mode of 'Song of the Knight': $4.99 USD
Free Mode of 'Shining Stars': $4.99 USD
Both modes support free trial before purchase. 
'Song of the Knights' can be played for free up to the end of Chapter 2, while 'Shining Stars' can be experienced freely for one in-game year.
Note: Prices may vary depending on local exchange rates.




Song of the Knights:
This story mode is adapted from Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz's 'The Teutonic Knights'. The gameplay combines card-based battles with RPG character development, featuring a companion skill combo system where different cards trigger unique partner skills, allowing players to build various strategic decks. Along the journey, players will meet and recruit many companions, embarking on a grand and epic adventure.




Shining Stars:

Set in the magical continent of Antana, this mode features six culturally distinct nations. Players take on the role of a minor lord from one of the kingdoms. As the demon realm prepares to invade, players must travel the land, recruit companions, form their own knight order, and grow stronger to defend the front lines of humanity.




【Device Support】
iOS 10.0 or later
Devices with 3GB RAM or more
iPhone 7 or newer
iPad Air 3 or newer





【Contact Us】
If you need help during the game or encounter any issues, feel free to contact us via email.
Official Email: knight@longyougame.com
